_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Both wild type and Nf1 mutant spheres formed Schwann cells with cytoplasmic S100β expression, bipolar morphology and elongated nuclei
details: Successfully detected Schwann cell differentiation in both wild type and Nf1 mutant spheres with cytoplasmic S100β expression and bipolar morphology
